summary: El secretario de Estado de Estados Unidos, Marco Rubio, asegura que el Gobierno del presidente Donald Trump "seguirá utilizando" todas las herramientas a su alcance para hacer frente a las "amenazas de seguridad" que plantea el régimen en Cuba con el objetivo de impulsar reformas económicas y políti

title: El absentismo es un cáncer, lo diga quien lo diga
summary: El alto absentismo es una lacra y reducir el debate a un tema semántico es propio de irresponsables. Leer

title: Hacienda repite propuesta de financiación autonómica: ceder el 55% del IRPF y el 56,5% del IVA a las CCAA
summary: Hacienda ha enviado a las comunidades autónomas su propuesta para la financiación autonómica, con las mismas bases que la anterior. Leer

title: Hundreds return home as deadly Spain wildfire nears control
summary: A wildfire that has killed at least 12 people in southern Spain was close to being brought under control Sunday, allowing hundreds of evacuated residents to return home as firefighters worked to fully stabilise the blaze, offficials said.

title: MAP: How to find out where Spain's wildfires are
summary: Spain experiences wildfires over summer, threatening homes and causing devastation across thousands of hectares. Here's how to use Google to find out where active blazes are occurring.

title: Spain into World Cup semi-final with France after late strike against Belgium
summary: Spain struck late to beat Belgium 2-1 on Friday and move onto a blockbuster World Cup semi-final against France after a game decided by a goalkeeping error from Senne Lammens.

title: LATEST: Where are the wildfires in Spain right now?
summary: With wildfires burning in several parts of Spain, here's how to find out where they are and the risk level where you live on Friday July 10th.

title: Four British victims reportedly among Spain wildfire dead
summary: A fast-moving wildfire in southern Spain killed 12 people of different nationalities, four believed to be British, after trapping them in vehicles and as they tried to flee on foot, authorities said on Friday.

title: Ten ways to protect your Spanish property against the summer heat
summary: When summer arrives in Spain, bringing with it scorching temperatures, you may start to notice that your home suffer too, whether it's windows and doors swelling, cracks appearing or more insects getting inside.

title: Devastating wildfire in Spain leaves at least 12 dead and 23 missing
summary: A fast-moving wildfire that killed at least 12 people was tearing through a tourist area in southern Spain on Friday after trapping people in burning vehicles and as they tried to flee on foot.

title: Six hidden gems which will make you consider a move to 'Empty Spain'
summary: Rural Spain still lies largely undiscovered by tourism and many foreign residents. Here are some charming treasures that lie well off the beaten track which may seduce you enough to buy a second home there or consider a move for a more peaceful life.
